name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Crypto Watcher lets you track coins and get price alerts.

• 📋 Watchlist — add coins to track
• 💰 Price — check current prices
• 🔔 Alerts — set price or percent alerts
• ⚙️ Settings — quiet hours and summary

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
